title: meliosma myriantha var. stewardii
intro: Meliosma myriantha var. stewardii is a variant of the Meliosma myriantha plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Alangiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Philippines, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Meliosma myriantha var. stewardii are traditionally used in infusions, decoctions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
